role_summary: Civil Rights History Project interviewee; the LoC oral history is the primary archival source for this catalog page.
ai_reading: Robert G. Clark Jr.'s top semantic neighbor is Charles McLaurin (entry 17, count 183); the broader cluster includes Ekwueme Michael Thelwell (#34), Walter Bruce (#123), Ernest Adolphus Finney Jr. (#39).
biographical_paragraph: Robert G. Clark Jr.'s oral history is held at the Library of Congress as entry 107 of the Civil Rights History Project (American Folklife Center accession AFC 2010/039) [src: 1]. The LoC transcript carries a publication-block audit tier: known issues exist that prevent full publication-grade certification, and any specific biographical or quoted claims drawn from the transcript itself should be confirmed against external sources before citation. Independent biographical sourcing for an extended orientation paragraph is pending; the strongest signal currently available is the embedding pattern named in the AI's reading above.
